title: Price Impact Kills
relevance_summary: Large collateral swap through CoW Protocol resulting in significant price impact due to thin liquidity in SushiSwap pool

prevention.rule: Block any large collateral swaps through CoW Protocol that target pools with insufficient liquidity.

red_flags: large trade volume relative to pool size
monitoring_rules: Block any large collateral swaps through CoW Protocol that target pools with insufficient liquidity.
summary: A $50 million collateral swap through CoW Protocol resulted in a significant price impact due to thin liquidity in a SushiSwap pool, resulting in a loss of approximately $46.34 million.
